script:
set +e
echo '=== /home dirs ==='
ls -1 /home/ 2>&1
echo '=== systemd User= for every bot/responder service ==='
for u in $(systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-legend --no-pager 2>&1 | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E '(bot|responder)\.service'); do
  user=$(systemctl show -p User --value "$u" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$u user=$user"
done
echo '=== per-user .claude/.credentials.json mtimes ==='
ls -la /home/*/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=== per-user errors.log (most recent) ==='
ls -lt /home/*/.* -d 2>/dev/null | head -1
find /home -maxdepth 4 -name 'responder-errors.log' -mtime -2 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '===END==='
